diagrams.title: Connected Graph Example
diagrams.description: A connected graph where path exists between every pair of vertices
diagrams.purpose: Visualize connected graph concept - all vertices reachable from any other

diagrams.title: Disconnected Graph Example
diagrams.description: A disconnected graph with two separate components
elements: One component: triangle, other: isolated vertices
diagrams.purpose: Understand disconnected graph - cannot travel between components

diagrams.title: Component Visualization
diagrams.description: Showing three components in one graph
diagrams.purpose: Identify and count components in disconnected graphs

diagrams.title: Tree vs Cycle vs Complete
diagrams.description: Comparison of K₄, C₄, and P₄
elements: C₄: 4 vertices in a square cycle, 4 edges
diagrams.purpose: Compare different graph types and their connectivity
